tasks.label: Deploy: Copy to HA Server
tasks.command: $cfg = @{}; Get-Content '${workspaceFolder}\.vscode\deploy.env' | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '^#' -and $_ -match '=' } | ForEach-Object { $k,$v = $_ -split '=',2; $cfg[$k.Trim()] = $v.Trim() }; robocopy '${workspaceFolder}\custom_components\jutai_ble_lights' $cfg['HA_DEPLOY_PATH'] /MIR /NP; if ($LASTEXITCODE -le 7) { exit 0 } else { exit $LASTEXITCODE }
